node.text: { "ok": false, "mode": "gemma", "runs": 3, "threads": 2, "gemmaBackendPreference": "GpuOnly", "modelRoot": "\/storage\/emulated\/0\/Android\/media\/com.firstaid.copilot.debug\/models", "summary": "Gemma=Ready ASR=Ready TTS=Ready sherpa=Ready", "gemmaReady": true, "asrReady": true, "ttsReady": true, "phase": "finished", "updatedAtMs": 1780750156279, "gemma": { "ok": false, "latencyMs": 663, "backend": "", "prompt": "你是急救语音助手。用一句不超过15个字的中文回答：成人心肺复苏的按压频率是多少？", "generateOk": false, "generateError": "prewarm failed", "error": "java.lang.IllegalStateException: java.lang.reflect.InvocationTargetException: Failed to create engine: INTERNAL: ERROR: [third_party\/odml\/litert_lm\/runtime\/executor\/llm_litert_compiled_model_executor.cc:1951]\n└ ERROR: [.\/third_party\/odml\/litert\/litert\/cc\/litert_compiled_model.h:1472]" } }
